title: Intel presents Starfire, a space processor based on Panther Lake with 18A cores
summary: Intel's space chip, designed to withstand extreme temperatures and radiation, combines a Panther Lake CPU with an Intel 3 GPU for government applications.

title: Uber boosts its robotaxis while Madrid prepares for their arrival and regulation grows
summary: The company advances in the deployment of autonomous vehicles with new services, regulatory pressure and concrete plans in Spain, while an app allows comparing prices among operators.

title: Apple reinforces its commitment to artificial intelligence with Siri, new APIs and the future M7 Ultra chip
summary: The Cupertino company expands its AI capabilities with improvements in Siri, a voice analysis API and a massive chip with 1.5 TB memory planned for 2028.

title: A Zotac RTX 5090 catches fire during use, but the 16-pin connector is not to blame
summary: A Zotac RTX 5090 unit suffered a fire within minutes of use, although investigations indicate that the problem is not the power connector.

title: Lenovo presents Legion C700, its new cloud gaming handheld console with Tencent START support
summary: The Legion C700 is a portable console focused on cloud gaming, which bets on a different approach and will feature the Tencent START platform.

title: Lenovo launches a mini PC with Intel Lunar Lake and 16 GB of non-expandable memory
summary: Lenovo's new mini PC, available for $1,179, features an Intel Core Ultra 5 226V processor with 16 GB of soldered RAM.

title: Cooler Master HAF 500 II: review of the new version of the classic chassis with improved airflow
summary: Reviews highlight the impressive airflow and spacious interior of the new HAF 500 II, maintaining the spirit of the series.

title: Satya Nadella warns companies about AI and criticizes OpenAI and Anthropic for data distillation
summary: Microsoft's CEO warned about the risks of artificial intelligence and accused AI labs of prohibiting distillation while training with others' data.

title: Rocket recovery successes: China achieves its first reuse and SpaceX gets permission to fly Starship
summary: China recovers the first stage of a rocket for the first time, imitating SpaceX and Blue Origin, while the FAA gives the green light to Starship after the May failure.

title: Memory market on alert: SK Hynix questions the cycle, Micron invests $500 million in the US and apocalyptic prices are warned
summary: Major memory manufacturers show conflicting signals: SK Hynix believes the traditional cycle is dead, Micron bets on local production, and drastic increases are forecast.

title: Apple sues former employee who stole confidential files to take them to OpenAI
summary: The company accuses a former worker of exploiting a rare bug to download internal documents and then joining OpenAI, in a legal battle over trade secrets.

title: AI-generated video startup PixVerse raises $439 million and surpasses $2 billion valuation
summary: PixVerse, specialized in generating videos using artificial intelligence, closes a massive round that shoots its valuation over two billion dollars.

title: General Fusion debuts on the stock exchange as the first publicly traded nuclear fusion company
summary: The nuclear fusion company hits the stock market with great investor reception, becoming the first of its kind in public markets.

title: Nintendo could equip the Switch 2 with a 1080p OLED screen according to new rumors
summary: It is speculated that Nintendo's next console will feature a 1080p OLED screen, improving on its predecessor's specifications.

title: Tesla manufactures its AI5 chip on a 2nm node at Samsung Foundry, months after doing so at TSMC
summary: Tesla's new artificial intelligence processor, manufactured with 2nm technology, comes out of Samsung Foundry and prepares for production, in parallel with the tape-out at TSMC.

title: Meta expands its AI supercluster Hyperion to 5 GW and raises its investment in Louisiana to more than $50 billion
summary: Meta's plan for its artificial intelligence infrastructure reaches 5 GW in Hyperion, with a record investment in the state of Louisiana and local improvements.

title: US orders suspension of Telegram's t.me domain, blocking access to links worldwide
summary: By order of the US government, the domain used for Telegram links was suspended, preventing global access to these links.

title: Japan develops method to recover up to 90% of lithium from used electric vehicle batteries
summary: Japanese researchers create an efficient process that allows extracting most of the lithium from depleted batteries, improving recycling sustainability.

title: A 22-year-old CEO defends the 996 work schedule as a voluntary 'product' and states that 'giving 95% effort equals 0%'
summary: The young entrepreneur justifies the 9-to-9, six-days-a-week work regime as a personal choice to achieve maximum performance.

title: PS5 emulator reaches GTA V menus and begins loading 3D games on PC
summary: The Sony console emulation project manages to run the first three-dimensional titles on computers, marking an important milestone.
